overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character riding a horse through a dense forest at night, illuminated by a handheld lantern. The character dismounts mid-clip and leads the horse on foot along a winding dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest trail at night

events.description: character dismounts the horse and begins leading it by foot

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through the forest trail at night, holding a lantern to illuminate the path ahead

entered.detail: Tall pine trees forming a dense wall along the left side of the trail
Tall pine trees forming a dense wall along the right side of the trail
Narrow winding dirt trail through the forest floor
Large rocky outcrop visible between the trees on the left
Bright circular pool of warm light cast by the character's lantern onto the ground

segments.scene_description: The character rides a horse along a narrow dirt trail through a dense pine forest at night. The scene is illuminated only by the lantern's light pool on the ground, with tall trees enclosing the path on both sides and occasional rock formations visible through the darkness.

agents.ego_description: walking beside the horse and leading it by the reins along the forest trail

notable_agents.action: the horse walking calmly beside the character, being led by the reins along the path

entered.detail: Open grassy area visible through the trees on the right side of the trail
Mountain ridge visible in the distance through gaps in the forest canopy

segments.scene_description: After dismounting, the character leads the horse on foot along the forest trail. The camera follows from behind, showing the character walking beside the horse with the lantern illuminating the path, as the forest opens slightly to reveal grassy clearings and distant mountain ridges.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic pine forest at night that gradually opens into a wider mountain landscape. It begins with the character riding a horse along a narrow dirt trail, where the only visibility is provided by a pool of lantern light reflecting off the ground and nearby rock formations. As the character dismounts, the camera shifts to follow from behind while they lead the horse on foot through the dense trees. The scene then expands as the enclosing forest gives way to grassy clearings, allowing the lantern's glow to reveal distant mountain ridges against the dark sky.
